rationale: This pair appears substantively connected: the citing paper’s core focus is heterogeneity in the satisfaction–shareholder value linkage, and the cited paper is explicitly titled and described as modeling “Customer Satisfaction Heterogeneity and Shareholder Value.” The citing note also states it extends prior satisfaction–shareholder value research and addresses mixed findings via heterogeneity, which aligns closely with the cited paper’s contributions. With a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.47.4.612), this is not an obvious incidental mention.
